description_long: This object is a modular synthesizer control panel, specifically the Omnimod by the brand Instruo. The front face features four input jacks at the top, each labeled numerically, and four output jacks below them, all surrounded by a matte black metal panel. Below the jacks is a rectangular display screen, likely for visualizing waveforms or modulation data, flanked by two large rotary knobs for parameter adjustment. The panel is secured with four mounting holes at the corners, and the side views reveal the shallow depth of the unit, with protruding jacks and knobs. The back is mostly flat, with the jacks and buttons extending outward, indicating this is designed to be mounted in a rack or modular synthesizer case.
description: A black modular synthesizer control panel with multiple jacks, a display screen, and rotary knobs, branded as Instruo Omnimod. Designed for rack mounting, it features a sleek, professional finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all input/output jacks, display screen, rotary knobs, and branding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the shallow depth and protruding jacks and knobs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the panel and the protruding jacks and buttons.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the jacks and knobs.
